headline: Privacy-preserving inference and a cluster of data-resilience techniques broke out this quarter while open-weight coding models pushed AI-assisted development forward.
body: Privacy-preserving inference led the rotation with a ratio of 79, and a new cluster of resilience techniques entered the field together: data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, and ransomware protection. The same privacy and security pressure showed up in deployment, with the Broward School Board pausing an educator AI platform over privacy and security concerns [7]. On the build side, open-weight coding models advanced AI-assisted development, with GLM-5.2 offered free through OpenCode for repo exploration, bug fixes, and refactoring [0], alongside a new local image generator running through ComfyUI [4]. New agent-oriented technique entrants including the doer-judge framework, role confusion, and emergent behavior appeared as agentic adoption was described as still early-stage [5].

cited_items.title: GLM 5.2 FULLY FREE & FAST CODER: This AI Coder is CRAZY & WORKS!
